channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 11th June
item.description:
PLEASE CUT BACK LOW TREE BRANCHES 5M FOOTWAY CLOSURE MARKED (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 11th June
item.description:
make safe, tree branch blocking footpath will require chainsaw
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 11th June
item.description:
Large tree down blocking both lanes and vehciles using lay-by to get around , Police Incident number 163/11062026- Tree has now been moved by Public to the side of the road . road now clear but tree may need cutting up and removing
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: An inspection chamber cover in the public footpath has been driven over and damaged. The cover has partial sunken in and rocks when you walk over it. This represents a significant trip hazard., 11th June
item.description:
The BT inspection chamber cover in the footpath of Down Hatherley Lane halfway between the A38 junction and the entrance to Athelai Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Down Hatherley Lane, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Tunnel under road is flooded, 11th June
item.description:
Tunnel under road is quite flooded

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in the middle of the road., 11th June
item.description:
The pothole is on the road between No6 and No3 Chelmsford Avenue. The debris from the pothole is continuously thrown across the road towards the pavement which endangers children on their way to school. The debris which consists of various size pebbles and tar is dangerous. This potholes is weeks old and getting bigger all the time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Chelmsford Avenue, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second Report of Multiple Potholes, 11th June
item.description:
Once again I am having to reporting to report the poor road surface approaching Gotherington from Bishops Cleeve. If (as today) you meet oncoming traffic you are forced to the edge of the road where the surface is badly damaged. Please don't mark this as 'fixed' until you have fixed the issues.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain carlton place, 11th June
item.description:
Corner of Carlton PLace and St Pauls Road. drain is blocked causing flooding.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Place, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain st Pauls Road, 11th June
item.description:
St Pauls Road opposite folly road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 11th June
item.description:
jet gully and line
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 11th June
item.description:
PERM - job 43120803 - loose bollard on Church Rd/Leckhampton road - Unsafe Asset - bollard looks like it may have been hit as there is alot of loose concrete on Island
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Massive Branch tree has fallen, 11th June
item.description:
A large tree branch has fallen onto the pavement on London Road. The branch is causing a significant obstruction to pedestrian access, forcing pedestrians to step into the roadway to pass, which presents a safety risk.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Hole In Road Outside Pub, 11th June
item.description:
Pot hole again in same place as always, probably gets fixed 5 times a year at a guess, by junction just outside pub turning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lack of double yellow line on this part of the road means that vehicles often park like the white van pictured. Today this has lead to the bin lorry not being able to access a large proportion of the lane. This would also prevent emergency services accessing the lane too and could ultimately lead to an unnecessary death potentially. It's under 1 year since the double yellow line were first put on the lane and this particular location being missed off is presenting a public safety issue time and time again!, 11th June
item.description:
Kerb opposite number 29

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Bafford Lane, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous hole in ground, 11th June
item.description:
A car lost control on the corner near the Prince of Wales Stadium car park 2 months ago and mounted the pavement and damaged the surface badly. This seriously dangerous hole has been like this since then and noone has repaired it or made it safe. Please make it safe ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince Regent Avenue, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is permanently out problem, 11th June
item.description:
Customer reports multiple streetlights out at the location.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mirror obstructed by hedgerows/trees, 10th June
item.description:
The mirror on approach to the mini roundabout from Cleeve Hill to Prestbury is obscured by hedges/trees.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Noverton Lane, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
